text.title: LLM Observability and Monitoring — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Where must trace data reside (data residency)?

branch.question: Is OTel-native preferred over Langfuse self-host?

branch.conclusion: Use native OTel + Phoenix viewer. Full self-host stack.
Langfuse self-host. EU-resident traces; PII redacted client-side.
Phoenix OSS self-host. Lower features but free.
LangSmith SaaS or Langfuse Cloud. Manage by IAM.

example.p: EU customer data, langfuse_self self-host, 100% coverage, daily eval, cost alert 2x/100x → pii_redaction=true.
